option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>
<!-- Design system tokens --> <color name="ds_primary">#A29BFE</color> <color name="ds_background">#121212</color> <color name="ds_surface">#1E1E2C</color> <color name="ds_text_primary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="ds_text_secondary">#B0B0C3</color> <color name="ds_border">#2C2C3A</color> <color name="ds_success">#00C853</color> <color name="ds_warning">#FFB300</color> <color name="ds_error">#FF5252</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases (kept to avoid breaking existing UI logic) --> <color name="primary">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="primary_light">#2A2740</color> <color name="background">@color/ds_background</color> <color name="text_main">@color/ds_text_primary</color> <color name="text_secondary">@color/ds_text_secondary</color> <color name="card_bg">@color/ds_surface</color> <color name="divider">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="accent_orange">@color/ds_warning</color> <color name="accent_green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="accent_purple">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="red">@color/ds_error</color> <color name="gray_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg">#262635</color> <color name="input_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_bg">#28263A</color> <color name="button_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="text_hint">#9999B0</color> <color name="icon_secondary">#8A8AA1</color> <color name="divider_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_stroke_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg_light">#262635</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>
<!-- Design system tokens --> <color name="ds_primary">#A29BFE</color> <color name="ds_background">#121212</color> <color name="ds_surface">#1E1E2C</color> <color name="ds_text_primary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="ds_text_secondary">#B0B0C3</color> <color name="ds_border">#2C2C3A</color> <color name="ds_success">#00C853</color> <color name="ds_warning">#FFB300</color> <color name="ds_error">#FF5252</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases (kept to avoid breaking existing UI logic) --> <color name="primary">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="primary_light">#2A2740</color> <color name="background">@color/ds_background</color> <color name="text_main">@color/ds_text_primary</color> <color name="text_secondary">@color/ds_text_secondary</color> <color name="card_bg">@color/ds_surface</color> <color name="divider">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="accent_orange">@color/ds_warning</color> <color name="accent_green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="accent_purple">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="red">@color/ds_error</color> <color name="gray_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg">#262635</color> <color name="input_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_bg">#28263A</color> <color name="button_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="text_hint">#9999B0</color> <color name="icon_secondary">#8A8AA1</color> <color name="divider_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_stroke_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg_light">#262635</color>
<!-- Flashcard dynamic state colors (dark) --> <color name="flashcard_quick_question_bg">#2A2740</color> <color name="flashcard_quick_answer_bg">#25362F</color> <color name="flashcard_active_question_bg">#262639</color> <color name="flashcard_active_answer_bg">#233140</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>
<!-- Design system tokens --> <color name="ds_primary">#6C5CE7</color> <color name="ds_background">#F8F9FC</color> <color name="ds_surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="ds_text_primary">#1E1E2C</color> <color name="ds_text_secondary">#6B6B80</color> <color name="ds_border">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="ds_success">#00C853</color> <color name="ds_warning">#FFB300</color> <color name="ds_error">#FF5252</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases (kept to avoid breaking existing UI logic) --> <color name="primary">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="primary_light">#EEEAFE</color> <color name="background">@color/ds_background</color> <color name="text_main">@color/ds_text_primary</color> <color name="text_secondary">@color/ds_text_secondary</color> <color name="card_bg">@color/ds_surface</color> <color name="divider">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="accent_orange">@color/ds_warning</color> <color name="accent_green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="accent_purple">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="red">@color/ds_error</color> <color name="gray_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg">#F3F2FD</color> <color name="input_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_bg">#F1EFFF</color> <color name="button_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="text_hint">#9A99AD</color> <color name="icon_secondary">#8B8A9E</color> <color name="divider_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_stroke_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg_light">#F3F2FD</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color>
<!-- Design system tokens --> <color name="ds_primary">#6C5CE7</color> <color name="ds_background">#F8F9FC</color> <color name="ds_surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="ds_text_primary">#1E1E2C</color> <color name="ds_text_secondary">#6B6B80</color> <color name="ds_border">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="ds_success">#00C853</color> <color name="ds_warning">#FFB300</color> <color name="ds_error">#FF5252</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases (kept to avoid breaking existing UI logic) --> <color name="primary">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="primary_light">#EEEAFE</color> <color name="background">@color/ds_background</color> <color name="text_main">@color/ds_text_primary</color> <color name="text_secondary">@color/ds_text_secondary</color> <color name="card_bg">@color/ds_surface</color> <color name="divider">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="accent_orange">@color/ds_warning</color> <color name="accent_green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="accent_purple">@color/ds_primary</color> <color name="green">@color/ds_success</color> <color name="red">@color/ds_error</color> <color name="gray_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg">#F3F2FD</color> <color name="input_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_bg">#F1EFFF</color> <color name="button_stroke">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="text_hint">#9A99AD</color> <color name="icon_secondary">#8B8A9E</color> <color name="divider_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="button_stroke_light">@color/ds_border</color> <color name="input_bg_light">#F3F2FD</color>
<!-- Flashcard dynamic state colors (light) --> <color name="flashcard_quick_question_bg">#F2EEFF</color> <color name="flashcard_quick_answer_bg">#EDF8F1</color> <color name="flashcard_active_question_bg">#ECEAF9</color> <color name="flashcard_active_answer_bg">#E6EDF6</color> </resources>
